name: EGO Power+ LM2156SP 21" 56V Self-Propelled Cordless Lawn Mower
whatWorks: Variable-speed self-propel adjusts naturally to your walking pace — a dial on the handle lets you dial in your preferred speed rather than fighting a fixed drive rate. Owners report it works well on gentle slopes without requiring extra effort.
The 56V brushless motor handles thick, overgrown grass without bogging that plagues weaker battery mowers. Multiple owners note it chews through a week's growth after rain without slowing.

7.5Ah battery covers roughly a third of an acre per charge — adequate for most urban and suburban Canadian lots. The 56V platform is shared with EGO's blowers, trimmers, and chainsaws, so one battery ecosystem covers the full yard tool set.

Weather-sealed construction handles Canadian spring conditions — light rain and morning dew won't sideline the mower. The steel deck and reinforced housing feel closer to gas-mower durability than typical battery options.
worthKnowing: Battery and charger inclusion varies by listing — some Amazon listings are tool-only, others are full kits. Confirm the kit version before ordering, as the 7.5Ah battery alone runs $150–$200 CAD.
At $849 CAD, this is priced above comparable gas self-propelled mowers. The total-cost advantage only materializes over several seasons of gas and maintenance savings.
The 21" deck is standard for residential mowers but not best-in-class — some competitors offer 22". On lots over half an acre, extra passes add up noticeably.
Charge time is roughly 90 minutes with the standard charger. EGO's rapid charger (sold separately) brings this down significantly but adds cost.

commonComplaints.title: Battery and charger not included…
commonComplaints.body: Battery and charger not included in the base model listing — I paid $849 thinking I was getting the full kit and had to buy them separately. Check the listing carefully.

commonComplaints.title: Pricier than a comparable gas…
commonComplaints.body: Pricier than a comparable gas mower when you factor in the battery. The math eventually works out but the upfront hit is real.

commonComplaints.title: 21 inch deck means extra passes…
commonComplaints.body: 21 inch deck means extra passes on my half-acre. Would prefer 22. Still cuts clean though.

commonComplaints.title: 90 minute charge time is the…
commonComplaints.body: 90 minute charge time is the main limitation. On a big yard day I needed two charges and had to plan around it.

verdict: The EGO LM2156SP is the benchmark for battery self-propelled mowers in Canada — the 56V brushless motor delivers gas-equivalent cutting power, the variable-speed drive handles inclines without wrestling, and the 7.5Ah battery covers most suburban lots on a single charge. The price is real: $849+ CAD puts it above gas alternatives, and the battery/charger inclusion varies by listing. But for buyers already in the EGO 56V ecosystem, it's the natural centrepiece of a fully battery-powered yard tool setup, and it earns that position.

realBuyers.quote: So much quieter than my old gas mower — I can actually mow at 7am without waking the neighbours.
Self-propel handled my sloped front yard without any issues. Set the speed dial and just walked.
I already have EGO 56V batteries from my blower — this mower made the whole system click. One charger, multiple tools.
No gas, no oil, no pull cord. Just charged it and started mowing. That alone is worth the premium.

sources.title: Best Cordless Lawn Mowers 2025 — Bob Vila

metaDescription: EGO Power+ LM2156SP 21" self-propelled cordless mower review for Canada: 56V brushless motor, variable-speed drive, 7.5Ah battery. Honest on price and deck size. ~$849 CAD.
introText: The EGO Power+ LM2156SP is a 21", 56V self-propelled cordless mower that matches gas cutting power without the noise, fumes, or seasonal maintenance. It's the anchor product of EGO's 56V outdoor tool ecosystem. Available on Amazon.ca (ASIN B0832FZ1X7) at around $849 CAD.
